rationale: The citing paper explicitly says it extends prior assortment-management and store-choice research, and its mechanism centers on favorite-brand availability, substitution, and switching behavior—constructs that closely match the cited paper’s core contribution on multidimensional assortment and store choice (including favorite brand availability). Given this strong conceptual overlap, this citation is plausibly foundational/theoretical rather than incidental, even though the raw evidence only shows a DOI match.
